## Phase 3: Activate Quality Gates

1. Add SONAR_TOKEN to GitHub Settings > Secrets
2. Add SNYK_TOKEN for dependency CVE scanning
3. Disable Automatic Analysis in SonarCloud project settings
4. Verify first green CI run: test, secrets-scan, sast, quality-gate all pass
